title: zornia apiculata
intro: Zornia apiculata, also known as sticktight or Texas tick clover, is a perennial legume native to the southeastern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antibacterial agent. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that can help with wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Zornia apiculata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
